[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in a white hooded mask is standing in a black-and-white, cluttered interior with shelves and tools behind them, posing with both hands raised near their face.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person wearing a white, bulky hooded costume or mask covering the head and face, with a bright glow or overexposed area around the mouth/chin region. The person’s hands are raised on either side of the head, bent at the elbows, with the palms facing inward. Their lower clothing includes a black outfit with a white graphic printed on the chest area.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors, resembling a workshop or room with work surfaces and storage. Behind the person are shelves and a counter lined with various items including containers, paper or fabric-like objects, tools, and upright sticks or handles. The floor is light-colored and segmented into rectangular tiles.

Visual Details:
The image is strongly monochrome, dominated by white and black tones. Lighting is harsh and bright around the center of the person’s face, creating a washed-out effect. The person’s hood/mask looks thick and angular at the top, with dark openings or shadows near the face area. The black-and-white graphic on the front of the outfit appears as stylized, layered characters. The camera angle is eye-level to slightly elevated, framing the person from head to mid-torso, with the background receding in perspective.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
A person wearing a white hooded mask and a black outfit with a white graphic is standing indoors in front of a busy workbench or shelf area. The person holds both hands up near their head while bright lighting creates a strong glare around the mask area.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
